libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment or system properties are required. Meaningful coverage should be written as Scala 3 test code that imports io.circe.literal._ and exercises the json string interpolator, including literal JSON and interpolated values.
risks: The library's primary API is an inline Scala macro, so Java-only tests or tests that only touch circe-core APIs will miss the intended circe-literal usage.
Runtime dynamic coverage may mostly show expanded circe Json operations because the macro itself runs at compile time.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.circe:circe-literal_3 is a self-contained Scala 3 compile-time JSON literal/interpolator module; its Maven POM already brings circe-core_3 and circe-jawn_3, with jawn-parser available transitively, and it does not require an external service, Docker image, extra test dependency, or environment/system property.
